scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.install:all: python3.11 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -e './backend[dev]' && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.format: npm --prefix frontend run format && .venv/bin/ruff format backend
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix frontend run format:check && .venv/bin/ruff format --check backend
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && .venv/bin/ruff check backend
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run check:secrets
